name: Group Stage Takes Shape World Cup 2026
angle: With the second round of group fixtures done, the 2026 World Cup picture is sharpening: all three hosts are unbeaten, Germany and the Dutch are running riot, and a few of the favourites have already dropped points.

questions.question: All three host nations have come through the opening two rounds unbeaten. Which trio is staging the 2026 World Cup?
The reigning world champions opened their defence with a controlled 3-0 win over Algeria. Who are they?
One side set the early benchmark for ruthlessness, hammering Curacao 7-1. Which nation was it?
The Netherlands followed a 2-2 draw with Japan by thrashing which side 5-1?
Among the favourites, Brazil dropped points in their opener, held to a 1-1 draw by which African side?
Morocco backed up that point by beating which returning nation 1-0 to share top spot in Group C with Brazil?
Canada delighted the home crowd with a 6-0 rout in Group B. Who were on the wrong end of it?
England began their campaign with a 4-2 win over which beaten 2018 World Cup finalists?
Spain looked laboured in a goalless opener before finding their rhythm with a 4-0 win over whom?
Which fancied side drew 1-1 with Egypt and 0-0 with Iran in the group stage, leaving them third in Group G?
Japan recovered from their 2-2 draw with the Netherlands to beat Tunisia by what score?
France opened Group I with a 3-1 win over which African side, on a night Norway beat Iraq 4-1?
Switzerland kept pace with hosts Canada at the top of Group B thanks to a 4-1 win over which side?
Mexico sit top of Group A with two wins and no goals conceded. Having beaten South Africa 2-0, who did they then edge 1-0?
Before their own 5-1 defeat to the Netherlands, Sweden had won by that exact 5-1 scoreline. Which side did Sweden put five past?

sources: https://www.cbssports.com/soccer/news/world-cup-group-standings-table-results/ (CBS Sports — full group A-L standings and results through 21 June 2026; Germany 7-1 Curacao, Netherlands 5-1 Sweden, Canada 6-0 Qatar, Spain 4-0 Saudi Arabia, Japan 4-0 Tunisia, Switzerland 4-1 Bosnia, Sweden 5-1 Tunisia, Mexico 1-0 South Korea, Brazil 1-1 Morocco, Morocco 1-0 Scotland, France 3-1 Senegal, Argentina 3-0 Algeria, England 4-2 Croatia)

https://www.nbcsports.com/soccer/news/2026-world-cup-group-stage-table-full-standings-for-all-12-groups (NBC Sports — full standings cross-check; Germany 6 pts +7, Mexico/USA 6 pts, Spain top Group H; confirms 48-team format and top-two + best-eight-third advance)

https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/world-cup-2026-scores-results-schedule-live-updates-195336732.html (Yahoo Sports — 21 June: Egypt 3-1 New Zealand, Belgium 0-0 Iran, Spain 4-0 Saudi Arabia, Uruguay 2-2 Cabo Verde)
https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/48939282/2026-fifa-world-cup-fixtures-results-match-schedule-group-stage-knockout-rounds-bracket (ESPN — 2026 World Cup fixtures, results and bracket)
